title: lachnagrostis lachnantha
intro: Lachnagrostis lachnantha, also known as the tufted hair grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. The plant is native to Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lachnagrostis lachnantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Lachnagrostis lachnantha can be made from its leaves and stems, which are typically dried and then infused in hot water to make a tea.
